summary: Unskipped and rewrote T-018-01, T-018-04, T-018-05 to verify shader uniforms (uBassEnergy, uDisplacementScale, uMotionAmplitude, uBreathScale) and mesh-level transforms (rotation.y, position.z) instead of CPU-side particle positions. Added 4 new tests: T-018-07 (bassToMacro power curve mapping), T-018-08 (camera orbit radius bass scaling via cameraMotion.ts), T-018-09 (synthetic bass fallback time-varying signal), T-018-10 (EMA smoothing convergence). All 10 tests pass, full suite 726/726 green, build succeeds. No production code changes needed.
